prompt: Create diff.js that exports a 'diff(oldText, newText)' function. It should return an array of change objects: { type: 'add'|'remove'|'equal', value: string } representing the line-by-line diff between two multiline strings. Also export 'formatDiff(changes)' that returns a unified diff string with +/- prefixes for added/removed lines and a space prefix for equal lines.
description: Implement a line-by-line diff algorithm with unified format output
